message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title SendMessage Sequence Diagram

participant "SendMessageController" as Controller
participant "SendMessageEngine" as Engine
participant "SendMessageSender" as Sender
participant "Socket" as Socket
participant "ObjectOutputStream" as Stream

activate Controller
activate Engine

Controller -> Engine: sendMessage(message)
activate Sender
Engine -> Sender: create(message, port)
activate Socket
Sender -> Socket: create(message.getInetAddress(), port)
deactivate Socket
Engine -> Sender: sendMessage()
activate Stream
Sender -> Stream: create(socket.getOutputStream())
Sender -> Stream: writeObject(message.getSheetTalkMessage())
Sender -> Stream: flush()
Sender -> Stream: close()
deactivate Stream
Sender -> Socket: close()
deactivate Socket
deactivate Sender
deactivate Engine
deactivate Controller

@enduml
```
